description: P-401, P-402, P-403, P-204 applied as defaults; first-run pass
State-machine parser for CSV (inQuotes flag, char-by-char loop). Considered split+regex; rejected because escaped quotes within quoted fields require state.
Round-trip test passes for non-trivial inputs (commas, quotes, newlines mixed). Validates symmetric escape/parse — strong invariant for any format-conversion tool.
